name: impl_verify_result
description: Report the impl-verify execution plan in structured format. Call this tool to record your verification strategy.

risk_level.description: The risk level driving verification depth

rounds_to_execute.description: Which verification rounds to execute (1=Requirements, 2=Domain Knowledge, 3=Plan, 4=Engineering Standards)

mandatory_rounds.description: Rounds that are mandatory (cannot be skipped)

skippable.description: Whether the entire verification can be skipped

parallel_dispatch.description: Whether rounds should be dispatched as parallel subagents
